---
name: Tuning feedback
about: A generated test or a fix wasn't good — help improve the skills
labels: tuning
---

**Command** (generate-tests / fix-failures / production-ready)

**Stack & app**

**What it produced** (the generated test or the fix — paste the diff/snippet)

**What it should have produced**

**Why** (brittle assertion, wrong root cause, weakened a test, etc.)

This feeds skill/engine fine-tuning — see CONTRIBUTING "Fine-tuning".
